product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Claude rises to No. 2 in the App Store following Pentagon dispute
product_updates.content: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.

product_updates.title: The billion-dollar infrastructure deals powering the AI boom
product_updates.content: Here's everything we know about the biggest AI infrastructure projects, including major spending from Meta, Oracle, Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI.

product_updates.title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman announces Pentagon deal with ‘technical safeguards’
product_updates.content: OpenAI's CEO claims its new defense contract includes protections addressing the same issues that became a flashpoint for Anthropic.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Google quantum-proofs HTTPS by squeezing 15kB of data into 700-byte space
technical_breakthroughs.content: Merkle Tree Certificate support is already in Chrome. Soon, it will be everywhere.
